name: lossless-prompt-compressor
install_doc: No install required. Copy SKILL.md into your Claude Code skills directory. The skill is invoked on demand to compress instruction documents.
notes: Pure Claude Code skill (prompt-only, no binary, no hook, no MCP). Compresses AI-facing instruction documents (CLAUDE.md, system prompts, agent rules, specs) in 4 progressive passes: Pass 1 strips Markdown formatting (automatic), Pass 2 deduplicates facts and compresses code/JSON blocks (approval-gated), Pass 3 removes human-only scaffolding like tutorials and coaching, Pass 4 full telegram-style rewrite. Operates on static input files before they enter the context, so this is cache-SAFE when applied offline — it reduces the size of persistent CLAUDE.md / system-prompt files that seed every conversation, effectively shrinking the cache-creation cost once rather than per-call. Targets Claude Code (and any agent with a skill runner). Novel: 23 catalogued techniques with before/after examples, section-number preservation, and an approval gate preventing accidental fact loss.
claude_md: Copy SKILL.md to your Claude Code skills directory, then invoke via /lossless-prompt-compressor.
